_description: Dark editorial 9:16 card. Heading is always bright white. Body text and label use the accent color. Only two colors to think about per slide: 'bg' (dark background) and 'accent' (the pop of color).

_slots.heading: REQUIRED — main heading. 1–8 words. Always rendered in bright warm white (#f0ece4).
_slots.body: optional — supporting paragraph. 1–3 sentences. Rendered in the accent color.
_slots.label: optional — short uppercase eyebrow tag (e.g. 'Chapter 01'). Rendered in accent color.
_slots.image: optional — file path relative to data JSON or https:// URL. Never cropped (object-fit: contain).
_slots.image-position: optional — 'top' (hero above text) or 'bottom' (below heading, above body). Default: 'bottom'.
_slots.accent: optional — the one color that gives each slide personality. Used for label, rule, and body text. Default: #c8b89a.
_slots.bg: optional — dark background color. Keep it dark — heading is fixed white. Default: #0f0e0c.
_slots.footer: optional — small muted text at bottom-left (e.g. author, handle).

title: Design Principles

slides.label: Chapter 01
slides.heading: Less is more
slides.body: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication. Remove everything that does not serve the message.

slides.label: Chapter 02
slides.heading: White space breathes
slides.body: Empty space is not wasted space. It gives the eye room to rest.

slides.label: Chapter 04
slides.heading: Image speaks first
slides.body: A single photograph can anchor an entire narrative.
